seo_title_index: Autonautica - Premium Yachts and Luxury Vessels
seo_desc_index: Autonautica is your reliable partner in the nautical world. Sale of top-quality new and pre-owned luxury boats, yachts, and premium vessels.
about_p1: Autonautica is your reliable partner in the world of yachting. We specialize in the sale of top-quality new and pre-owned vessels, with a special emphasis on uncompromising quality, safety, and luxury at sea.
about_p2: Our goal is to provide you with a complete service – from expert advice when choosing the ideal boat, all the way to post-purchase support. Leave the details to us and sail carefree.
blog_h3_1: How to properly prepare your boat for the summer season
blog_h3_2: Top 5 hidden bays on the Adriatic for anchoring a yacht
blog_h3_3: Buying guide: What to look out for with pre-owned boats
blog_p_1: Find out what crucial steps and checks you need to make before the first sail to ensure a carefree summer...
blog_p_2: We bring you a list of the most beautiful and safest locations that you must visit with your vessel this year...
blog_p_3: Hull inspection, engine hours, and documentation. Learn how to spot an excellent opportunity and avoid costly mistakes...
contact_desc: Do you have questions about our offer or want to arrange a boat viewing? Feel free to contact us.
contact_info:
Address: Most Raša 8a, HR-52223 Raša, Croatia
Phone: +385 (0)52 894 6942
E-mail: info@autonautica.hr
Working hours: Mon - Fri: 08:00 - 16:00
seo_desc_katalog: Explore the complete fleet of Granfort sports cruisers. View technical specifications, equipment lists, and request a quote for models from 188 to 370 GTX.
brand_desc: Granfort represents the pinnacle of modern naval architecture, combining sporty performance with exceptional comfort. Each model in this fleet is designed with a focus on stability, economical sailing, and maximum utilization of deck space.
seo_desc_g188: Detailed technical specifications, standard equipment list, and photo gallery for the Granfort 188 boat. Request your official offer today.
g188_subtitle: A compact and agile sports cruiser built for daily enjoyment at sea.

seo_desc_V33: Learn all about the premium cruiser Schaefer V33. Ultimate luxury and space, technical specifications with twin engines, standard equipment list, and image gallery.
g370gtx_subtitle: The V33 is the first model from the V-line. Modern design and the latest manufacturing technology, with all structural parts made by the vacuum infusion process, guarantee a fast and stable ride even in difficult conditions. A single-level deck with high sides and a smart cabin layout below deck offer unprecedented usability.
g188_eq_3: Gourmet station with sink, faucet, waste bin, storage, and cabinet
g188_eq_8: Stainless steel and leather steering wheel

seo_desc_v44: Schaefer V44 sets new standards for premium cruisers. View specifications, innovative side platforms, and the luxury interior of this flagship vessel.
v44_subtitle: To solidify the success of the Schaefer V33 and continue the distinctive V-line, Schaefer Yachts proudly presents the new Schaefer V44. This impressive 44-foot model offers the option of sterndrive or even triple outboard engines. The true innovation lies in the spacious single-level cockpit, two large 2.4-meter hydraulic balconies, and a hydraulic platform. All these elements together transform the vessel into a spectacular, private beach club. As expected, the new Schaefer V44 also brings greater comfort. The expanded accommodation capacity within the V-line now allows for an exceptionally comfortable and safe overnight stay for up to four people.

seo_desc_s380: Discover the luxury yacht Schaefer 380. View detailed technical specifications, spacious interior, premium equipment list, and the image gallery.
s380_subtitle: The new Schaefer 380 is a luxurious and spacious model that delivers premium equipment and comfort typically found on much larger vessels. Its innovative design offers exceptional deck flexibility with options like a functional stern galley with a grill or a large sundeck lounge. The main highlight of this model is the two opening side balconies that dramatically expand the living and relaxation space on the water. The hardtop with a sliding mechanism allows quick adjustment to all weather conditions, while the smartly designed walk-through windshield guarantees safe and easy access to the bow. The interior conceals an elegant cabin with four berths, a fully equipped galley, and a spacious bathroom with a separate shower stall.

seo_desc_s400: Discover the luxury and elegance of the Schaefer 400 yacht. View detailed technical specifications, spacious interior layout, premium standard equipment, and the image gallery.
s400_subtitle:
With its distinctive design and numerous accolades for its agility and speed, the Schaefer 400 captivates audiences at first glance. This model features a unique hardtop for its category. The spacious deck with a gourmet space continues the Schaefer Yachts tradition of maximizing outdoor living space.

With high ceilings in the cabins and being the only vessel in its class with two luxury suites, this boat provides comfort and refinement that make the Schaefer 400 an extension of your own home. You can choose from various powertrain configurations: outboard engines or inboard diesel and gasoline engines.

seo_desc_s450: Meet the impressive Schaefer 450 yacht. View complete technical specifications, spacious and luxurious interior layout, premium standard equipment, and the image gallery.
s450_subtitle: The Schaefer 450 redefines luxury and comfort at sea, blending its signature sporty design with premium spatial solutions. This model stands out with an expanded flybridge and a smartly organized deck featuring a gourmet space, creating the perfect environment for socializing and entertainment. The spacious salon and richly illuminated cabins bring a refinement that makes you feel right at home, while the innovative folding side terraces allow you to instantly expand the cockpit into a private beach club. You can choose from various powertrain configurations with the latest generation inboard engines ensuring exceptional maneuverability and high cruising performance.

seo_desc_s510s: Discover the luxury sports yacht Schaefer 510S. View technical characteristics, innovative luxury interior layout, standard equipment list, and the image gallery.
s510s_subtitle: The Schaefer 510 Sport Pininfarina represents the pinnacle of luxury and style. With a bold yet elegant appearance infused with aesthetically modern lines and special attention dedicated to innovative and ergonomic use of space, the Schaefer 510 Sport Pininfarina redefines the concept of excellence. seo_desc_s510gt: Meet the impressive luxury yacht Schaefer 510 GT. View complete technical specifications, interior layout, premium equipment list, and the image gallery.
s510gt_subtitle: Introducing the new Schaefer 510 GT Pininfarina. What was already an exceptional yacht is now even better. A central full-beam master suite with headroom exceeding 1.8 meters delivers the space and comfort you expect from a premium vessel. Choose from several different layouts, such as two, three, or four cabins, a large salon, or an additional galley on the lower deck.

s600_subtitle: Experience the ultimate comfort and elegance offered uniquely by the Schaefer 600. With a large folding platform on the starboard side, the Schaefer 600 opens up space and provides practicality never seen before.

seo_desc_s26m: Meet the fascinating superyacht Schaefer 26 m. View complete technical specifications, spacious interior layout, premium equipment list, and the image gallery.
s26m_subtitle: The Schaefer 26M represents the pinnacle of engineering, elegance, and spaciousness, officially becoming the largest and most luxurious model in the fleet of the renowned Schaefer Yachts shipyard. This impressive 85-foot (26.04 meters) motor yacht blends a distinctive Brazilian passion for the sea with cutting-edge vacuum infusion technology and an advanced design signed by the founder and acclaimed designer Marcio Schaefer. Built for those who do not compromise, the Schaefer 26M offers a perfect blend of sporty dynamics and unprecedented comfort on the water.
s26m_form_msg: Your message or specific questions regarding the Schaefer 26 m model...

seo_desc_schaefer_katalog: Explore the complete range of luxury yachts and cruisers from Schaefer Yachts. View specifications and request an official quote for models from V33 to the 26-meter superyacht.
schaefer_brand_desc: Schaefer Yachts represent a perfect blend of Brazilian passion for the sea, cutting-edge technology, and a distinctive modern design that conquers the Adriatic coast. These luxury motor yachts, known for outstanding performance, spaciousness, and innovative 'beach club' solutions, are built for carefree cruising and enjoying the sea even in the most demanding weather conditions.
